title: Top Soil
description: A sprinkle of enhancements on top of Vanilla.
body:
Top Soil is a sprinkle of enhancements on _top_ of Vanilla, using textures, models and sounds to make the game prettier.

Has compatibility with Appleskin, and for the full experience, uses features from Continuity/Entity Model Features mods.

---
